summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five hydrated open PRs. No GitHub mutations are permitted by this job. No security-sensitive items were detected. None has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation; two need explicit maintainer/product judgment, and three should remain open as useful but not yet finalizable PRs.

Maintainer product decision needed on whether to accept the new CLI option; merge and close are both unsafe from this plan.
Small useful docs PR should stay open for normal maintainer finalization; merge preflight is incomplete.
Useful related logs-follow fix, but merge is blocked by missing complete merge preflight.
